Each of our caps is crafted on a bespoke silhouette, refined over three years of development. The design combines the timeless structure of a traditional trucker body with the sophistication of a pre-curved, short visor at the front.

M 32” 13.8 30.3 43.31 11.0
L 34” 14.2 30.3 43.90 11.5
XL 36” 14.6 30.3 44.49 12.0
XXL 38” 15.0 30.3 45.08 12.5

waist
Measured from side to side straight across both relaxed and when stretched.

front rise
Measured from top of waistband to crotch seam

inseam
Measured from crotch seam to hem opening

length
Measured from top of waistband to hem opening

leg opening
Measured across the hem from each side
